ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the ticket (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the ticket */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the ticket */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the customer who submitted the ticket */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was last updated */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the ticket */,
  "view_link" TEXT /* Link to view the details of the ticket */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was resolved */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the support agent assigned to the ticket */,
  "customer_satisfaction" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the customer after the ticket is resolved */,
  "escalation_level" TEXT /* Level of escalation for high-priority tickets */,
  "initial_response_time" TEXT /* Time taken to provide the first response to the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_username FOREIGN KEY ("username") REFERENCES users ("username"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the support category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the support category */,
  "sla_time" TEXT /* Service Level Agreement time for the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket that was updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was updated */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., status change, priority update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_history_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was added */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the comment is private (visible only to support agents) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_comments_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket the attachment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the attachment */,
  "attachment_date" TEXT /* Date when the attachment was uploaded */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the attachment */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the attachment in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., PDF, JPG) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_attachments_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_attachments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
